synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2777 Oracle Linux 9 qemu-kvm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2777
description:
[9.1.0-29.el9_7.6]
- kvm-Revert-i386-cpu-Move-adjustment-of-CPUID_EXT_PDCM-be.patch [RHEL-135451]
- Resolves: RHEL-135451
  (Live migration after workload update fails with operation failed: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm [rhel-9])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.5]
- kvm-file-posix-Handle-suspended-dm-multipath-better-for-.patch [RHEL-133302]
- Resolves: RHEL-133302
  (The VM hit io error when do S3-PR integration on the pass-through  failover multipath device [rhel-9.7.z])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.4]
- kvm-accel-kvm-check-for-KVM_CAP_READONLY_MEM-on-VM.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-fix-interaction-with-hugetlb-me.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-Unify-the-retrieval-of-the-bloc.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-scsi-disk-Apply-error-policy-for-host_status-errors-.patch [RHEL-130209]
- Resolves: RHEL-129551
  ([RHEL 9]snp guest fail to boot with hugepage [rhel-9.7.z])
- Resolves: RHEL-130209
  (scsi-block: Error policy is ignored for host_status errors [rhel-9.7.z])
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2777

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2777.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
qemu-guest-agent-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.x86_64.rpm
qemu-img-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.x86_64.rpm
qemu-kvm-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.x86_64.rpm

qemu-pr-helper-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
qemu-guest-agent-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm

qemu-kvm-common-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-core-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-display-virtio-gpu-pci-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-host-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm
qemu-kvm-device-usb-redirect-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.aarch64.rpm

http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/qemu-kvm-9.1.0-29.el9_7.6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.6]
- kvm-Revert-i386-cpu-Move-adjustment-of-CPUID_EXT_PDCM-be.patch [RHEL-135451]
- Resolves: RHEL-135451
  (Live migration after workload update fails with operation failed: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm [rhel-9])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.5]
- kvm-file-posix-Handle-suspended-dm-multipath-better-for-.patch [RHEL-133302]
- Resolves: RHEL-133302
  (The VM hit io error when do S3-PR integration on the pass-through  failover multipath device [rhel-9.7.z])

[9.1.0-29.el9_7.4]
- kvm-accel-kvm-check-for-KVM_CAP_READONLY_MEM-on-VM.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-fix-interaction-with-hugetlb-me.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-ram-block-attributes-Unify-the-retrieval-of-the-bloc.patch [RHEL-129551]
- kvm-scsi-disk-Apply-error-policy-for-host_status-errors-.patch [RHEL-130209]
- Resolves: RHEL-129551
  ([RHEL 9]snp guest fail to boot with hugepage [rhel-9.7.z])
- Resolves: RHEL-130209
  (scsi-block: Error policy is ignored for host_status errors [rhel-9.7.z])
